issues.title: Enemy dealt 10 damage (59% of 17 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: At turn seq 100, floor 1 encounter 2, enemy dealt 10 damage when player had 17 HP. This is 59% of player's HP, exceeding the 50% threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 10 damage (59% of player's 17 HP)

issues.suggestedFix: Review enemy damage scaling; consider capping single-hit damage relative to player max HP

issues.title: Enemy dealt 15 damage (107% of 14 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: At turn seq 108, floor 1 encounter 2, enemy dealt 15 damage when player had 14 HP. This is 107% of player's HP, exceeding the 50% threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 15 damage (107% of player's 14 HP)

issues.suggestedFix: Review enemy damage scaling; consider capping single-hit damage relative to player max HP

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 1 (early death)
issues.description: beginner profile was defeated on floor 1 with 55.26315789473685% accuracy. Final encounter against ember_drake (mini_boss), dealt 16 but took 106 damage. Early deaths discourage new players.
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce floor 1 enemy damage or HP significantly; new players should rarely die on floor 1

issues.title: Unfun moment: HP dropped from 67 (84%) to 0 (0%) in F1E2
issues.description: Player HP dropped from 67 to 0 (106 damage taken) in a single encounter against ember_drake (mini_boss) on floor 1. This kind of dramatic swing feels punishing and unfun.
issues.suggestedFix: Add a damage cap per encounter or emergency shield mechanic when HP drops below threshold
